title: Vanilla Reimagined (V.R)
description: for those who want vanilla with a spark of life
body: Have you ever wanted vanilla MC but with a Explosive KICK well Vanilla Reimagined does just that whether its taking over a structure and making it yours or using all the new wood types for a stunning cabin or modern home or hey maybe even stop by a village (i heard they did some upgrades) or chill with the villagers on the ocean villages (using the tidal towns mod) no matter who you are theres always a way to relax
